title: Motivational Monday - Don’t Wait for “One Day”
excerpt: Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton…
body:
Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton Select brush online at Joann. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!

In case you missed it, I have some of my favorite quotes scanned in and available as printable PDF's in the shop! Thank you for being a wonderful blog reader (and go-getter)!
